name: Feature request

assignees: ""

> Tip: many language features are **already planned** — please skim [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md)
> and [FEATURES.md](../../FEATURES.md) first. If it's on the roadmap, a 👍 on the relevant issue is
> more useful than a new one.

## What problem does this solve

<!-- Describe the need, not just the feature. What can't you express today? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Syntax sketch, CLI flag, or behavior. A small example helps. -->

```phorge
// what you'd like to write
```

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other ways to solve the same problem. -->

## Scope / impact

- [ ] Language semantics (affects backend parity — interpreter + VM must agree)
- [ ] CLI / tooling only
- [ ] `phorge build` / distribution
- [ ] Docs

## Additional context

<!-- Prior art in other languages, links, etc. -->
